# `corporate` — corporate templates

**Industry:** Cross-industry  ·  **Templates:** 3

Generic corporate phishing templates covering news, travel, and internal communications

Phishing-simulation templates for **authorized** security awareness training with [GoPhish](https://getgophish.com/) and [HailBytes SAT](https://hailbytes.com/sat?utm_source=github&utm_medium=folder_readme&utm_campaign=gophish-training-templates). See the [repository README](../README.md) for setup and the [full template catalog](../docs/CATALOG.md) for every category at a glance.

## Templates

| Template | File | Attack vector | Difficulty | Est. click rate |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Breaking News Alert | [`breaking_news.html`](breaking_news.html) | credential_harvest | intermediate | 35-55% |
| Corporate Travel Agency Notice | [`travel_agency.html`](travel_agency.html) | credential_harvest | intermediate | 35-55% |
| Corporate Performance Review Request | [`performance_review.html`](performance_review.html) | credential_harvest | intermediate | 40-60% |

## Template details

### Breaking News Alert

- **File:** [`breaking_news.html`](breaking_news.html)
- **Attack vector:** credential_harvest · **Difficulty:** intermediate · **Est. click rate:** 35-55%
- **GoPhish variables:** `{{.FirstName}}` `{{.Email}}` `{{.URL}}` `{{.Tracker}}`
- **Paired training page:** [`education/corporate_education.html`](education/corporate_education.html)
- **Suggested subject lines:**
  - Breaking: Major announcement affecting your department
  - Urgent internal news — employees must read
  - CEO announcement: Important company update
- **Operator notes:** Leans on curiosity and fear of missing out around company news. Most effective during periods of real organizational change (reorgs, M&A) when employees expect announcements. Avoid running it alongside genuine all-hands comms to prevent confusion.

### Corporate Travel Agency Notice

- **File:** [`travel_agency.html`](travel_agency.html)
- **Attack vector:** credential_harvest · **Difficulty:** intermediate · **Est. click rate:** 35-55%
- **GoPhish variables:** `{{.FirstName}}` `{{.LastName}}` `{{.Email}}` `{{.URL}}` `{{.Tracker}}`
- **Paired training page:** [`education/corporate_education.html`](education/corporate_education.html)
- **Suggested subject lines:**
  - Your upcoming travel booking requires action
  - Corporate Travel: Update your travel profile before your trip
  - Travel approval: Your trip itinerary has changed
- **Operator notes:** Best aimed at frequent travelers and sales teams. The booking-change pretext creates time pressure without alarming the recipient. Customize the agency name to match a travel tool your organization actually uses.

### Corporate Performance Review Request

- **File:** [`performance_review.html`](performance_review.html)
- **Attack vector:** credential_harvest · **Difficulty:** intermediate · **Est. click rate:** 40-60%
- **GoPhish variables:** `{{.FirstName}}` `{{.LastName}}` `{{.Email}}` `{{.URL}}` `{{.Tracker}}` `{{.RId}}`
- **Paired training page:** [`education/corporate_education.html`](education/corporate_education.html)
- **Suggested subject lines:**
  - Annual Performance Evaluation: Complete your self-assessment
  - Manager Request: Finalize your performance review by Friday
  - HR Performance: Review your feedback for the annual appraisal cycle
- **Operator notes:** Performance review cycles are high-anxiety events. Employees are highly motivated to respond quickly to HR requests regarding appraisals and salary reviews.

## How to use

1. In GoPhish, go to **Email Templates → New Template** and paste the HTML from the file above. Set a subject line from the suggestions.
2. Create a **Landing Page** (see [`../landing-pages/`](../landing-pages/)) to capture the click, and — where a training page is listed — redirect clickers to it so they get immediate education.
3. Configure a realistic **Sending Profile** and launch to a consented, in-scope group. Schedule during business hours for realism.

> **Before sending:** customize sender names, domains, logos, and any brand impersonations to match your engagement and your authorization scope. These templates are for authorized training only.
